## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits; AI-assisted commits include a
      `Co-Authored-By:` trailer
- [ ] This PR does not replace or restyle bundled sample assets (out of scope —
      see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to.
